content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Thu, 19 Feb 2026 12:36:38 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 320 | Critical: 30 | High: 54 | Medium: 201 | Low: 35

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [GLOBAL] Live Updates: South Korean Ex-Leader Is Sentenced to Life in Prison (NYT World)
  [MIDDLE EAST] OpenAI’s Altman: World ‘urgently’ needs AI regulation, similar to nuclear safeguards (Times of Israel)
  [UKRAINE] Ukraine's Culture Ministry introduces evacuation of museums within 50 km of front (Ukrainska Pravda)
  [GLOBAL] South Korea's ex-president jailed for life over martial law attempt (BBC World)
  [UKRAINE] ‼️ 🇪🇺 🤡 The EU is trying to issue an ultimatum to Moscow regarding Ukraine (RV Voenkor [tg:ru_milblog])

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (74 events, 7 critical, 3 high):
    - OpenAI’s Altman: World ‘urgently’ needs AI regulation, similar to nuclear safeguards
    - US said planning to withdraw all American troops from Syria over next two months
    - — ❗️ 🇮🇷 / 🇮🇶 NEW: A vehicle belonging to Omar Ilkhanizadeh, a high-ranking leader in the Komala Party, a Kurdish seperatist group designated as a terrorist organization by I...
  Ukraine/Russia (91 events, 9 critical, 24 high):
    - AFU counterattack to prevent enemy from advancing toward Dnipropetrovsk region, Voloshyn claims
    - Ukrainian forces holding back Russian advance towards Dnipropetrovsk Oblast on Oleksandrivka front
    - “Rubicon” day by day
  Europe (10 events, 1 critical, 6 high):
    - FSSB and Telegram The director of the FSSB of Russia, Bortnikov: “At present, the FSSB is not engaged in any negotiations with the founder of Telegram, Pavel Durov
    - Changes on the map over the past day: – Kharkovka has been liberated
    - Colombian mercenaries who were eliminated by the troops of the Russian Federation during the SWO zone: 1
  Global (69 events, 5 critical, 14 high):
    - Live Updates: South Korean Ex-Leader Is Sentenced to Life in Prison
    - The situation in the area under the responsibility of the “Vostok” military unit during the past night (data from @voin_dv): The enemy’s assault units made three unsuccessful at...
    - The “Daily Life of Soldiers” section
